title: BordersItems
description:
Borders Items Model Resource Pack for :

- Tiers / Rarety / Colors ( Use for )
- Compatible with CustomModelData !
- Beautiful Icons ( Animated )
body:
# BordersItemsPatron
## This **ResourcePack** allows you to add beautiful borders and decorations to your **Items**.
### (Simple and customizable to your needs!)

String Model Exemple(more Gallery !):


![StringModel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e5f3036359a1993547e0d30082aaaba28ef829.png)

**Give:
_/give @p potion[custom_model_data={floats:[1],strings:["item_tier_normal"]}] 1_ (1.21.4)** 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/q2DGvaAI8x0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>










## **How add/remove Strings:**


<details>
<summary>potion.json String</summary>
_assets/minecraft/items/potion.json_

![String](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f6226de661b3df28e00d95518613413560addf.png)


If u want change :
**Blue highlighted** = remove or add **String**

**Orange** = "onfalse"= in your hand "ontrue" in your inventory/hotbar

**Red** = Change the texture

**Purple** = The name of the StringModel !


**Green** = "value" = Change the color texture (⚠ preferably if it is white/ ⚠ Color is decimal )!

HexaColor---->>[Hexa Color](https://share.google/DQmmKKtj48tWh64qL))<----Click on me !


Decimal color ---->>[ColorHexa](https://www.colorhexa.com/ff0000)<----Click on me !

<details>
<summary>Decimal Color</summary>

![Decimal colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceb74d9647264ac295c3dff234cd9b9fbf50a3c2.png)

</details>

</details>



## **How add CustomModelData:**

<details>
<summary>potion.json CustomModelData</summary>

_assets/minecraft/items/potion.json_
![CustomModelData](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aaa5dab4b5e63abc9a377386678f926851b67ab.png)
**Blue highlighted** = add **CustomModelData**

**Green** = Change Model (CustomModelData)

**red/Threshold** = Change **number** of CustomModelData

</details>



## **Add String:**

**Texture :** _assets/minecraft/textures/border/gui/layer/tier..._

**Model :** _assets/minecraft/models/item/border/gui/layer/tier_

Change name **.json** and **texture name** by yours !
<details>
<summary>item/..</summary>
assets/minecraft/models/item/border/gui/layer/tier/fade
  
![Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ed308ec1d45d764a47d200d44d03de998b09f6.png)

</details>

Our other projects:
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/colorfull-biomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/colorfull-biomes)

![ColorFull-Biome Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d258d9f4710ee98e214547d1b13370af6ca2b6fe_0.webp)
